original_statement: who was the head coach of boldklubben frem for the longest amount of time?
mutated_statement: who was the main figure of something for the longest amount of time?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Role generalization: Proper club name "boldklubben frem" replaced by vague placeholder "something" | Specific role "head coach" generalized to "main figure" (who was the head coach of boldklubben frem for the longest amount of time? → who was the main figure of something for the longest amount of time?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和simple_query的内容可识别关键信息：judge_thought中逐项比较任期并明确写出“Therefore, among the clearly bounded tenures, Anders Theil served the longest.”，simple_query的thought也给出具体时长比较和结论。Agent直接把变异后的模糊问题当作原始清晰问题处理，逐项计算起止日期并返回具体答案Anders Theil，既未在judge_thought中提到替换实体“something”或角色泛化“main figure”带来的不确定性，也未向用户反问或请求澄清。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”，因为其行为表现为在不存在澄清的情况下按自己的默认理解直接作答，未体现对问题歧义或信息缺失的任何识别。
